nasb.text: That they should put their confidence in God And not forget the works of God, But keep His commandments,

esv.text: so that they should set their hope in God and not forget the works of God, but keep his commandments;

cnv.text: 使他們信靠　神， 不忘記　神的作為， 謹守他的誡命；

ccb.text: 这样，他们就会信靠上帝， 遵行祂的命令， 不忘记祂的作为；

csbs.text: 这样他们就把神当作他们的依靠， 不会忘记神所行的，而会谨守他的诫命；
